title: National award recognition for surgeon using AI to help patients
Anthropic in talks to use Microsoft's AI chips, The Information reports
description: Anthropic is in talks to rent servers powered by Microsoft’s AI chips for complex workloads, The Information reported on Thursday, citing two people who spoke to executives involved in the discussion.

title: 5,230 towers, AI systems power Saudi 's digital Hajj operations
description: Prince Saud bin Mishaal bin Abdulaziz reviewed the readiness of digital technologies, communications networks and artificial intelligence systems being deployed for the Hajj 1447 AH season to improve pilgrim services and crowd management across the holy sites

title: JP Morgan boss: AI means we’ll need fewer bankers
description: The boss of JP Morgan has said the Wall Street giant will need fewer bankers in the future as a result of AI.

title: Business News | Acuity Analytics Launches Domain-Led Agentic AI Platform to Help Financial Institutions Move From Experimentation to Enterprise Value
description: Get latest articles and stories on Business at LatestLY. London [UK], May 21: Acuity Analytics today announced the launch of Agent Fleet Pro, its next-generation, domain-led Agentic AI platform designed to help financial institutions move from fragmented experimentation to scalable, enterprise-wide value.
